prompt: Single freshly-sharpened chisel resting on a piece of finished walnut. Steel of the chisel catches one shaft of cool window light from upper-left, the wood warm and golden in contrast. Composition: 3:2 horizontal. — premium craftsmanship, hand-finished wood close-up, warm gold accent (#c9a84c) on deep black (#080808) background, soft directional light, photographic realism, no text in image, no emojis, no plastic / faux finishes
